Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Aug-01-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Conrad Donner for and with Marcia Schmelzer.

Mr. Donner stated that Attorney Mary Mayo told him that she would not be representing Lillian Williams. The Court granted the Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel as to Co-Executor Lillian Williams only (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
